languages.text: "Для начала предоставьте объект к осмотру. Возможно, его ценность велика лишь в ваших глазах". {n}Исполненным повелительного нетерпения жестом, Эоганн протягивает руку.{/n}
"First, present the object for inspection. It might only hold value in your eyes." {n}Eogunn extends his hand with a sharp, commanding gesture of impatience.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Для начала предоставьте объект к осмотру. Возможно, его ценность велика лишь в ваших глазах". {n}Исполненным повелительного нетерпения жестом, Эоганн протягивает руку.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "First, present the object for inspection. It might only hold value in your eyes." {n}Eogunn extends his hand with a sharp, commanding gesture of impatience.{/n}
"First, present the object for inspection. It might only hold value in your eyes." {n}Eogunn extends his hand with a sharp, commanding gesture of impatience.{/n}
"First, present the object for inspection. It might only hold value in your eyes." {n}Eogunn extends his hand with a sharp, commanding gesture of impatience.{/n}
"First, present the object for inspection. It might only hold value in your eyes." {n}Eogunn extends his hand with a sharp, commanding gesture of impatience.{/n}

languages.text: «Primero, permita que inspeccione el objeto en cuestión. Es posible que solo sea valioso para usted». {n}Eogunn alarga la mano con un gesto imperioso e impaciente.{/n}
languages.original_text: "First, present the object for inspection. It might only hold value in your eyes." {n}Eogunn extends his hand with a sharp, commanding gesture of impatience.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Primero, permita que inspeccione el objeto en cuestión. Es posible que solo sea valioso para usted». {n}Eogunn alarga la mano con un gesto imperioso e impaciente.{/n}

languages.text: “首先，把东西拿出来交予我检查。说不定它的价值只存在于你的想象之中。”{n}伊奥贡不耐烦地伸出手，动作果断而充满命令意味。{/n}
languages.original_text: "First, present the object for inspection. It might only hold value in your eyes." {n}Eogunn extends his hand with a sharp, commanding gesture of impatience.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “首先，把东西拿出来交予我检查。说不定它的价值只存在于你的想象之中。”{n}伊奥贡不耐烦地伸出手，动作果断而充满命令意味。{/n}

languages.text: "Zeigt mir zunächst das zu inspizierende Objekt. Möglicherweise ist es nur in Euren Augen wertvoll." {n}Eogunn streckt mit einer gleichsam ungeduldigen wie fordernden Geste seine Hand aus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "First, present the object for inspection. It might only hold value in your eyes." {n}Eogunn extends his hand with a sharp, commanding gesture of impatience.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Zeigt mir zunächst das zu inspizierende Objekt. Möglicherweise ist es nur in Euren Augen wertvoll." {n}Eogunn streckt mit einer gleichsam ungeduldigen wie fordernden Geste seine Hand aus.{/n}

languages.text: « Commencez par nous présenter l'objet pour inspection. Si ça se trouve, il n'a de valeur que pour vous. » {n}Eogunn tend brusquement la main dans un geste impérieux qui trahit son impatience.{/n}
languages.original_text: "First, present the object for inspection. It might only hold value in your eyes." {n}Eogunn extends his hand with a sharp, commanding gesture of impatience.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Commencez par nous présenter l'objet pour inspection. Si ça se trouve, il n'a de valeur que pour vous. » {n}Eogunn tend brusquement la main dans un geste impérieux qui trahit son impatience.{/n}

languages.text: "Önce inceleme için nesneyi sunun. Sadece sizin gözünüzde bir değeri olabilir." {n}Eogunn, keskin ve emredici bir sabırsızlık hareketiyle elini uzatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "First, present the object for inspection. It might only hold value in your eyes." {n}Eogunn extends his hand with a sharp, commanding gesture of impatience.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Önce inceleme için nesneyi sunun. Sadece sizin gözünüzde bir değeri olabilir." {n}Eogunn, keskin ve emredici bir sabırsızlık hareketiyle elini uzatıyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「まず、その物体を検査に供えなさい。それは、あなたの目には価値があるだけかもしれない。」{n}エオガンは鋭く、命令口調で、苛立ちを表す手ぶりをする。{/n}
languages.original_text: "First, present the object for inspection. It might only hold value in your eyes." {n}Eogunn extends his hand with a sharp, commanding gesture of impatience.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「まず、その物体を検査に供えなさい。それは、あなたの目には価値があるだけかもしれない。」{n}エオガンは鋭く、命令口調で、苛立ちを表す手ぶりをする。{/n}
